zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrud von Northeim於1090年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次道恩薩爾姆薩爾姆時，她的父親Graf Heinrich 'der Fette' von Northeim34歲，母親Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen30歲。她於1105年之前與Siegfried I van Ballenstedt van Orlamunde結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1165年在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿維利海內可享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrud von Northeim于1090年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次道恩薩爾姆薩爾姆时，她的父亲Graf Heinrich 'der Fette' von Northeim34岁，母亲Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen30岁。她于1105年之前与Siegfried I van Ballenstedt van Orlamunde结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1165年在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿維利海內可享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Northeim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads named from nord ‘north’ + heim ‘home, farmstead’.

variants.name: Nordrum
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of the five farms in eastern Norway, named in Old Norse as Northrheimr (see Nordheim ).

variants.name: Norheim
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nels, Oddvar.
Norwegian: either a variant of Nordheim or from a farm name composed of Old Norse nór ‘narrows’ (see Nohr 1) + heimr ‘homestead, farmstead’.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraud
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraut
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrud von Northeim was born in 1090, in Salm, Salm, Daun, Rhineland, Prussia, her father, Graf Heinrich 'der Fette' von Northeim, was 34 and her mother, Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen, was 30. She married Siegfried I van Ballenstedt van Orlamunde before 1105. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1165, in Rheineck, Ahrweiler, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrud von Northeim est née en 1090, à Salm, Salm, Daun, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Graf Heinrich 'der Fette' von Northeim, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Siegfried I van Ballenstedt van Orlamunde avant 1105. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1165, à Rheineck, Landkreis Ahrweiler, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.Loccum, Stolzenau, Hannover, Preußen, Du: Loccum, Kreis Stolzenau, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrud von Northeim 1090 in Salm, Salm, Daun, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Heinrich 'der Fette' von Northeim 34 und ihre Mutter Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen 30. Sie hat vor 1105 Siegfried I van Ballenstedt van Orlamunde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1165 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Rheineck, Landkreis Ahrweiler, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud von Northeim è nata il nel 1090 nel Salm, Salm, Daun, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, sua padre, Graf Heinrich 'der Fette' von Northeim, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Siegfried I van Ballenstedt van Orlamunde prima del 1105. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1165, nel Rheineck, Landkreis Ahrweiler, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrud von Northeimが1090年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズダウンサルムサルムで生まれた時，父Graf Heinrich 'der Fette' von Northeimは34歳，母Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißenは30歳であった。1105年以前にSiegfried I van Ballenstedt van Orlamundeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1165年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アールウエイラールヘアイネックで76歳で死去した。

ko.Loccum, Stolzenau, Hannover, Preußen, Du: 독일 플레우ss 플로빈츠 해노버 크레이스 스톨즌오 록쿠
ko.lifeSummary: Gertrud von Northeim(이)가 1090년 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 도 살름 살름에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Heinrich 'der Fette' von Northeim(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1105년 이전 Siegfried I van Ballenstedt van Orlamunde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1165년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 아위러 리이네크에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud von Northeim nasceu em 1090, em Salm, Salm, Daun, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Graf Heinrich 'der Fette' von Northeim, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Siegfried I van Ballenstedt van Orlamunde antes 1105. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1165, em Rheineck, Landkreis Ahrweiler, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 76 anos.

ru.Loccum, Stolzenau, Hannover, Preußen, Du: локкум, крис столзенау, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrud von Northeim родилась в 1090 г. в местности салм, салм, даун, раинпровинз, Пруссия, её отцу по имени Graf Heinrich 'der Fette' von Northeim было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Siegfried I van Ballenstedt van Orlamunde перед 1105 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1165 г. в местности рааинекк, ландкрис ахрвилир, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrud von Northeim nació en 1090, en Salm, Salm, Daun, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, su papá, Graf Heinrich 'der Fette' von Northeim, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Siegfried I van Ballenstedt van Orlamunde antes de 1105. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1165, en Rheineck, Landkreis Ahrweiler, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 76 años.
